titleStmt.title: SII 33.222: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 222. (A.R. No. B 171 of 1952.) Śrīraṅgam, Tiruchinapalli Taluk and District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: Third prākāra of the Rāmaliṅgasvāmin temple, proper right in the passage, south and west walls.
This is dated Śaka 1572, Vikṛiti, Mārgaśira ba. 5, Sunday, uttar-āshāḍha Vriśchika, Uttiraṭṭādi, Irregular.

This is probably bilingual and the summary is based on Tamil lines. Registers a poliyūṭṭu gift by Cheruku Chennamanāyaka son of Veṅgaḷappa and grandson of • • ., for various offerings on the occasion when the deity was brought and seated in the maṇḍapa in the grove which was also granted by the donor to the deity. Published: S.I.I., XXIV, No. 533.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1572 Ayina vikṛtināma saṁvatsara mā¨rgaśiramāsaṁ kṛṣṇapakṣaṁ paṁccamī Ādivāra Uttarāṣāḍha
nakṣatramaṁdu raṁganāthasvāmi śrī bhaṁḍāranaku Aḍiyev ceraku pautṛṁḍu veṁggaḷappanāyani putṛṁḍu cennamanāyaṁḍu daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci cēśina kaiṁkaryapatraṁ
Digital edition of SII 33.222 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
